limitations: The coframe audit closes the free coefficient slot by representation, not by introducing numeric coefficients.
No empirical mass, CKM, PMNS, residual, or prediction-ledger data are used.

rows.bhsm_input: quark coframe triplet from the v1.2 parent-action scaffold
rows.conclusion: triplet participation is required for the charged-sector boundary functional
rows.limitation: This fixes which coframe channel participates, not a new coefficient.

rows.bhsm_input: replace triplet by singlet coframe participation
rows.conclusion: variant conflicts with the v1.2C tested-sector ledger
rows.limitation: Failure of a nearby variant constrains structure but does not tune predictions.

rows.conclusion: independent coefficient is forbidden and represented by V_PSD/profile
rows.limitation: This closes the free coefficient slot; full scalar/topographic proof remains separate.

title: BHSM v2.11 Coframe Compatibility Rule Report
